runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Elixir", "build_system": "mix", "package_manager": "Hex (via Mix)", "build_commands": ["mix local.hex --force", "mix local.rebar --force", "mix escript.install hex protobuf --force", "mix clean --deps", "mix deps.get", "mix release"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.17", "system_packages": ["openssl"]}, "repo_type": "monorepo", "base_image": "debian:stable-backports", "base_image_rationale": "Chosen from the official images list as a minimal Debian base for the final runtime stage, aligning with the project\u2019s Debian-based runtime in a multi-stage build.", "pitfalls": ["The original Dockerfile targets debian:bookworm-slim for the final stage, which is not present in the official image list; using debian:stable-backports may affect library availability and ABI compatibility.", "The builder stage relies on elixir:1.17 which may have its own OS assumptions; ensure compatibility with the chosen final base image.", "Rust and several build-time tools (cmake, protobuf-compiler) increase image size and require network access; consider caching and multi-stage optimizations."], "notes": "This blueprint mirrors the multi-stage Elixir umbrella build in the repository: it builds dependencies, compiles a release with mix release, and places the release into a minimal runtime image. Adjust final base image tag if you switch to a different Debian/Ubuntu variant for compatibility."}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
# Add cargo to the path for subsequent steps
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean, fetch dependencies and build release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
RUN mix release

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl

# Copy the release from the builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/dev/rel/anoma .

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma release
ENTRYPOINT ["bin/anoma"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Exclude version control and build artifacts
.git
.gitignore

# Build artifacts
_build
deps

# Local development files
node_modules
*.log
*.tmp
*.swp
*.swo

# Misc
*.DS_Store

# Runtime cached builds (safe to ignore in repo builds)
priv/static
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
# Add cargo to the path for subsequent steps
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Pin protobuf escript to a specific version to improve compatibility
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf 0.12.0 --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean, fetch dependencies and build release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
# Build the release in production mode to ensure proper MIX_ENV
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl

# Copy the release from the builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma .

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Expose no ports by default; the runtime will run in the foreground
# Run the Anoma release
ENTRYPOINT ["./bin/anoma"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
# Add cargo to the path for subsequent steps
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation
COPY params params

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Use a newer protobuf escript for compatibility
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean, fetch dependencies and build release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
# Build the Anoma release (name specified to support multiple releases in mix.exs)
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

# Copy the release from the builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma ./
COPY --from=builder /app/params params

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma release in the foreground by default
ENTRYPOINT ["./bin/anoma"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
# Add cargo to the path for subsequent steps
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation
COPY params params

# If there is a params dir inside apps/anoma_lib/priv/params, copy it to /app/params for runtime use
RUN mkdir -p /app/params
RUN cp -r apps/anoma_lib/priv/params/. /app/params

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Use a newer protobuf escript for compatibility
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean, fetch dependencies and build release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
# Build the Anoma release (name specified to support multiple releases in mix.exs)
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

# Copy the release from the builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma ./
COPY --from=builder /app/params /app/params

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma release in the foreground by default
ENTRYPOINT ["./bin/anoma"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

steps.tool_input: {"path": "README.md"}
steps.tool_output_raw:
# Anoma

This is an implementation of the Anoma protocol, whose specs can be
found [here](https://specs.anoma.net/latest).

## Docs

- [Contributors documentation](https://anoma.github.io/anoma/readme.html)
- [Specification](https://specs.anoma.net/latest/)
- Developer Docs (Coming Soon™)
- User Docs (Coming Soon™)

## Following Development

Work is merged into `base` on a bi-weekly (once every two weeks)
schedule.

Development can be followed in multiple ways:

1. [Issues are put into the project overview](https://github.com/orgs/anoma/projects/19)
   - This is a good way to see what work is assigned and the various
     views into how goals are being met
2. [What's Cooking on Anoma](https://github.com/orgs/anoma/projects/20 "A good view on how topics are progressing throughout a cycle")
3. [Research Forums](https://research.anoma.net/)
   - This is good for seeing discussions on the direction of Anoma
   - [The architecture posts](https://research.anoma.net/tags/c/protocol-design/25/architecture)
     in particular are a practical vision for how the codebase's
     architecture will evolve. Around two of these get posted per week
4. [Issues](https://github.com/anoma/anoma/issues) and [pull requests](https://github.com/anoma/anoma/pulls)
   - This is good for viewing new issues and work coming in, but the
     other views are typically a better way to view this

## Running pre-built binaries
### Release Dependencies
To run a working Anoma Node the following dependencies are required:

1. Mac OS X Development Environment:
    * Install Apple Command Line Developer Tools: `xcode-select --install`
    * Install [MacPorts](https://www.macports.org/install.php) (or equivalent package manager)
2. Install [ncurses](https://ports.macports.org/port/ncurses/) (Mac OS X only)
3. Install OpenSSL:
    * Mac OS X and Linux: use package manager
    * Windows: not required
### Running
Download the [Anoma release](https://github.com/anoma/anoma/releases) for your platform, extract it, and run `bin/anoma`.
## Compilation from sources
### Build Dependencies

Dependencies needed regardless of platform.
 - Elixir: consult the installation instructions [here](https://elixir-lang.org/install.html)
 - Rust: consult the installation instructions [here](https://www.rust-lang.org/tools/install).
 - Protobuf: consult the installation instructions [here](https://grpc.io/docs/protoc-installation/)
 - Elixir plugin for protobufs `protoc-gen-elixir`
   ```shell
   mix escript.install hex protobuf 0.11.0
   ```
   Note here that the version is important.
   After installing this plugin, ensure that it is available in your path.
   If you are using `asdf`, call `asdf reshim`. If not, add `export PATH=~/.mix/escripts:$PATH` to your `.bashrc` or `.zshrc`.

   Verify all is well.
   ```shell
   $ protoc-gen-elixir --version
   0.11.0
   ```

----
#### MacOS
Ensure Apple Command Line Developer Tools are installed.

```shell
xcode-select --install
```

Using `brew`, install the following dependencies.

```shell
brew install elixir cmake protobuf git
```

---
#### Ubuntu/Debian

Dependencies that you might not have installed.

```shell
apt install cmake libwxgtk3.2-dev
```

---
#### Windows

 - Install [Build Tools for Visual Studio 2022](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/) (Workload: Visual C++ build tools)
 - Install [PowerShell](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/scripting/install/installing-powershell-on-windows?view=powershell-7.4)


---
### Compiling and Running

To install the dependencies as well as Anoma run:

```bash
mix deps.get
mix compile
```

To start an Anoma instance run one of these:

```bash
iex -S mix # starts an interactive shell
mix run --no-halt # starts a non-interactive shell
```

See the Contributing section for how to get the best use of the
interactive shell.

Further see the Known issues section if you encounter an issue.


## Docker images
To work with Docker images, do the following:
1. Install [Docker](https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/), this is necessary for both building and running Docker images
2. Build the Anoma image from the repository root: `docker build -t <IMAGE> .`
    * `<IMAGE>` is your chosen image name
4. Run the Anoma image: `docker run -it --network host <IMAGE> <SUBCOMMAND>`
    * `<IMAGE>` is the name of Anoma Docker image to be run
    * `<SUBCOMMAND>`is interpreted by the Anoma binary
    * `--network host` will enable connections from the host

## Contributing

Please read the [contributor's guide](./documentation/contributing.livemd) for in
depth details about the codebase.

## Known Issues

### (Mix) Could not compile dependency :enacl

For some versions of OSX (and Linux), our
[enacl](https://github.com/jlouis/enacl) package may have compilation issues.

To get around it please run

```sh
git checkout mariari/no-libsodium
mix clean
mix deps.get
mix compile
```

### could not compile dependency :cairo, "mix compile"

The rust compiler can be quite picky about our
[cairo](https://github.com/anoma/aarm-cairo) dependencies. This is
likely caused by an incompatible rust-toolchain.

To get around it you may have to run a command like:

```sh
rustup toolchain add 1.76.0
# for OSX you may try 1.76.0-aarch64-apple-darwin
```

Once this is had, the Cairo issues should go away.

### Git

This codebase follows a git style similar to
[git](https://git-scm.com/) or
[linux](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git).

New code should be based on `base`, and no attempt to keep it up to
sync with `main` should be had. When one's topic is ready, just submit
a PR on github and a maintainer will handle any merge conflicts.

There are bi-weekly releases, so do not be afraid if a maintainer says
the PR is merged but it's still open, this just means that it's merged
into `next` or `main` and will be included in the next scheduled
release.

For more information on a smooth git experience check out the [git
section in contributor's guide](./documentation/contributing/git.livemd)

Happy hacking, and don't be afraid to submit patches.

- MacOS setup (for building)

  - Or: mix run --no-halt  # non-interactive

- Docker

  - Run: docker run -it --network host <IMAGE> <SUBCOMMAND>

- Known issues and fixes

    - rustup toolchain add 1.76.0
    - (on OSX: 1.76.0-aarch64-apple-darwin)

- Quick reference commands/paths

  - mix escript.install hex protobuf 0.11.0
  - export PATH=~/.mix/escripts:$PATH
  - bin/anoma
  - docker build -t <IMAGE> .; docker run -it --network host <IMAGE> <SUBCOMMAND>

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
# Add cargo to the path for subsequent steps
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Use a newer protobuf escript for compatibility; pin to 0.11.0 for compatibility with generated proto code
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf 0.11.0 --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean, fetch dependencies and build release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
# Build the Anoma release (name specified to support multiple releases in mix.exs)
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

# Copy the release from the builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma ./

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma release in the foreground by default
ENTRYPOINT ["./bin/anoma"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

  - Command: RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

- Missing packages or files mentioned
  - None reported as missing; the issue is a mix release configuration problem (duplicated application).

- Version mismatch info
  - No version mismatch information reported; the log shows various toolchain components (Elixir 1.17, Debian stable-backports, etc.) but the failure is due to a duplicated application in the release, not a version conflict.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build a focused release for the Anoma client to avoid umbrella release issues
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation (if needed by umbrella; may be unused for client-only)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

# Copy core build files and umbrellas
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Install protobuf escript for protocol buffers (version pinned for compatibility)
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Build only the Anoma Client release to avoid umbrella duplication issues
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma_client

# Runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app
# Copy the client release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma_client ./anoma_client

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Expose a shell by default to keep container accessible for debugging
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

- No explicit version mismatch information is shown in the error output. The failure is due to missing dependencies (not due to a version conflict).

Context notes
- Prior steps show normal tool installations (Elixir 1.17, Rust toolchain via rustup) but the key blocker is dependencies not being available for MIX_ENV=prod during mix release.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation (if needed by umbrella; may be unused for client-only)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

# Copy core build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Use a protobuf escript compatible with the codebase
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Build only the Anoma Client release to avoid umbrella duplication issues
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma_client

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the client release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma_client ./anoma_client

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma Client release in the foreground by default if started without args
ENTRYPOINT ["./anoma_client/bin/anoma_client"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Get Elixir official image for build environment
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools needed for compiling
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation (if needed by umbrella; may be unused for client-only)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

# Copy core build files, umbrella source, and dependencies
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Use a protobuf escript compatible with the codebase; pin to 0.11.0 for compatibility with generated proto code
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf 0.11.0 --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean, fetch dependencies and build release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
# Build the umbrella release
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma .

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma release in the foreground by default
ENTRYPOINT ["./bin/anoma"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build a specific release for the umbrella project to avoid multi-release ambiguity
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install build dependencies and tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y cmake protobuf-compiler curl build-essential

# Install Rust for Cairo compilation (if needed for some apps)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

# Copy core build files and umbrella source
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Prepare Mix and dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
# Install protobuf escript for proto compilation
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Build a named umbrella release to avoid ambiguity
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Create a minimal runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime requirements
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y openssl ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma ./anoma

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Run the Anoma release in the foreground by default
ENTRYPOINT ["./anoma/bin/anoma"]
CMD ["foreground"]
"}

1. **MIX_ENV not set for production**  
   - *What failed:* `mix release` built in default (dev) environment.  
   - *Fix:* Explicitly set `ENV MIX_ENV=prod` before compilation and release steps. Use `mix deps.get --only prod && mix compile && mix release`.

2. **Missing runtime CA certificates**  
   - *What failed:* HTTPS/TLS operations would fail due to missing CA store in final runtime image.  
   - *Fix:* In runtime stage, install `ca-certificates` (`apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates`) and run `update-ca-certificates`.

3. **Build cache key computation error**  
   - *What failed:* Docker build error “failed to compute cache key: failed to calculate...” due to non-existent or context-excluded paths in `COPY`.  
   - *Fix:* Verify all `COPY` source paths exist and ensure `.dockerignore` does not exclude files required for build.

4. **Missing app directories during COPY**  
   - *What failed:* Copying e.g. `apps/anoma_lib/priv/params` failed when those folders weren’t present.  
   - *Fix:* Add conditional existence checks or create necessary directories before `COPY`. Avoid hard-coded nonexistent paths.

5. **Duplicated dependency (“mnesia”)**  
   - *What failed:* Elixir error: `** (Mix) Duplicated application included: mnesia in anoma_node and anoma_lib`.  
   - *Fix:* In umbrella context, remove duplicate dependencies in `mix.exs` of each app; only include `:mnesia` in one dependency set.

6. **Multiple release definitions**  
   - *What failed:* Error: `"mix release" was invoked without a name but there are multiple releases`.  
   - *Fix:* Invoke `mix release <release_name>` where `<release_name>` matches the main app (e.g. `mix release anoma_node`).

7. **Unpinned or mutable base images**  
   - *What failed:* Used `debian:stable-backports` and unpinned Elixir image; reproducibility concerns.  
   - *Fix:* Pin builder and runtime base images to full digests or explicit versions (e.g. `elixir:1.17.0-erlang-26.2-debian12`).

8. **Root user in runtime container**  
   - *What failed:* Security concern: container ran as root.  
   - *Fix:* Create non-root user (`RUN adduser --disabled-password --gecos "" appuser && chown -R appuser /app && USER appuser`).

9. **No default startup command**  
   - *What failed:* CMD left as `/bin/bash`; image didn’t start application.  
   - *Fix:* Use a runtime command like `CMD ["_build/prod/rel/anoma_node/bin/anoma_node", "start"]`.

10. **HEALTHCHECK and reliability gaps**  
    - *What failed:* No readiness or health check defined.  
    - *Fix:* Add `HEALTHCHECK CMD` to probe app health endpoint or process status.

11. **Inconsistent file structure assumptions**  
    - *What failed:* Build referenced files not guaranteed to exist (global_deps.exs, version.exs).  
    - *Fix:* Confirm actual repo layout before COPY; adjust paths or remove unnecessary COPY lines.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Anoma umbrella project
# Builder stage: Elixir environment with required tools
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (needed to build Cairo and related crates)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy project sources
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Setup Mix tools and fetch dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"
ENV MIX_ENV=prod

# Build dependencies and release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     ca-certificates \
     openssl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma ./

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Create a non-root user to run the application
RUN useradd --system --home /home/appuser --shell /bin/bash appuser \
  && chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

WORKDIR /app

# Default command to run the release
CMD ["bin/anoma", "start"]
"}

{"path": "​.dockerignore", "content": "# Docker ignore file for Anoma umbrella
# VCS directories
.git
.gitignore
.github

# IDEs and editors
.vscode
.idea

# Build outputs and caches
deps/
_build/
erl_crash.dump
_mix_release/
*.beam

# Node modules (if any)
node_modules/

# Misc artifacts
*.o
*.so
*.a
*.dll
*.dylib

# Local env files
.env
.env.*

"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Anoma umbrella project
# Builder stage: Elixir environment with required tools
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (needed to build Cairo and related crates)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy project sources
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation
COPY params params

# Setup Mix tools and fetch dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"
ENV MIX_ENV=prod

# Build dependencies and release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     ca-certificates \
     openssl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma ./

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Create a non-root user to run the application
RUN useradd --system --home /home/appuser --shell /bin/bash appuser \
  && chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

WORKDIR /app

# Default command to run the release
CMD ["bin/anoma", "start"]
"}

FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools

  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \

COPY documentation documentation

RUN mix local.rebar --force

# Build dependencies and release

RUN mix deps.get

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Anoma umbrella project
# Builder stage: Elixir environment with required tools
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (needed to build Cairo and related crates)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy project sources
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Setup Mix tools and fetch dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"
ENV MIX_ENV=prod

# Build dependencies and release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     ca-certificates \
     openssl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma /app/anoma

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Create a non-root user to run the application
RUN useradd --system --home /home/appuser --shell /bin/bash appuser \
  && chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

# Default command to run the release
CMD ["/app/anoma/bin/anoma", "start"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Anoma umbrella project
# Builder stage: Elixir environment with required tools
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (needed to build Cairo and related crates)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy project sources
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Setup Mix tools and fetch dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"
ENV MIX_ENV=prod

# Build dependencies and release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
# Build the umbrella release named 'anoma'
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     ca-certificates \
     openssl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma /app/anoma

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Create a non-root user to run the application
RUN useradd --system --home /home/appuser --shell /bin/bash appuser \
  && chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

WORKDIR /app

# Default command to run the release
CMD ["/app/anoma/bin/anoma", "start"]
"}

    - KeyError: :features not found in Google.Protobuf.MethodOptions during descriptor expansion.

- Version mismatch info
  - Protobuf library version noted: protobuf 0.11.0
  - The error arises from lib/anoma/protobuf/anoma/proto/advertisement_service.pb.ex:18, suggesting the generated proto expects a field/features option that is not defined in this protobuf version. This points to a protobuf library vs. generated proto version mismatch (need to regenerate or upgrade protobuf tooling to match).

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Anoma umbrella project
# Builder stage: Elixir environment with required tools
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (needed to build Cairo and related crates)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy project sources
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Setup Mix tools and fetch dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"
ENV MIX_ENV=prod

# Build dependencies and release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
# Build the umbrella release named 'anoma'
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     ca-certificates \
     openssl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma /app/anoma

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Create a non-root user to run the application
RUN useradd --system --home /home/appuser --shell /bin/bash appuser \
  && chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

WORKDIR /app

# Default command to run the release
CMD ["/app/anoma/bin/anoma", "start"]
"}

verify_build_details.build_error:
Summary of Docker build error

- Failing command/step:
  - RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma (builder 14/14) in the Dockerfile (line near 39).

- Exact error message and exit code:
  - Exit code: 1
  - Error:
    "** (KeyError) key :features not found
    (protobuf 0.11.0) expanding struct: Google.Protobuf.MethodOptions.__struct__/1
    lib/anoma/protobuf/anoma/proto/advertisement_service.pb.ex:18: Anoma.Proto.AdvertisementService.Service.descriptor/0"

- Context of failure:
  - Occurs during the mix release of the umbrella app (anoma) while compiling protobuf-generated code for Anoma.

- Missing packages or files mentioned:
  - None explicitly reported as missing in this portion of the log. The failure is a compile-time key error in protobuf-generated Elixir code, not a missing package/file notification.

- Version mismatch / relevant version info:
  - Protobuf library version shown: protobuf 0.11.0
  - Base image: Elixir 1.17 (elixir:1.17) on Debian stable-backports
  - The error implies a potential protobuf/Google.Protobuf compatibility issue (the code references a features option in MethodOptions that isn’t found in protobuf 0.11.0).

- Additional notes:
  - Prior steps mostly completed successfully; the failure happens at the final release step, preventing the build from finishing.

steps.tool_input: {"path": "Dockerfile"}
steps.tool_output_raw:
# Multi-stage build for Anoma umbrella project
# Builder stage: Elixir environment with required tools
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Install system dependencies and build tools
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     cmake \
     protobuf-compiler \
     curl \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (needed to build Cairo and related crates)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy project sources
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Setup Mix tools and fetch dependencies
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"
ENV MIX_ENV=prod

# Build dependencies and release
RUN mix clean --deps
RUN mix deps.get
# Build the umbrella release named 'anoma'
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma

# Runtime stage: minimal Debian-based image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     ca-certificates \
     openssl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the release from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma /app/anoma

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Create a non-root user to run the application
RUN useradd --system --home /home/appuser --shell /bin/bash appuser \
  && chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

WORKDIR /app

# Default command to run the release
CMD ["/app/anoma/bin/anoma", "start"]

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Release name mismatch**  
   - **What failed:** Several builds assumed the release name was `anoma`, copying `/app/_build/prod/rel/anoma`. VerifyBuild rejected it because the CMD path (`/app/bin/anoma`) didn’t exist.  
   - **Fix:** Confirm the actual release name from `mix.exs` or umbrella config and use that consistently in the `mix release <name>` and `COPY --from=builder` steps.

2. **Protobuf dependency failure**  
   - **What failed:** Build log showed `** (KeyError) key :features not found (protobuf 0.11.0)` during `RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release anoma`. That indicates a mismatch between `.proto` definitions and generated Elixir code or incompatible `protobuf` library version.  
   - **Fix:** Regenerate `.pb.ex` files using the same `protobuf` Elixir library version used in your builds (e.g., update dependencies in `mix.lock` or `mix.exs`). Ensure that `apps/anoma_protobuf/lib/...` files exist in the repo before running Docker build.

3. **Missing generated files**  
   - **What failed:** `advertisement_service.pb.ex` was referenced but not found in the repo (`FindFiles` found none). The missing file caused the earlier protobuf expansion error.  
   - **Fix:** Before building, run `mix protoc.generate` or the appropriate protobuf generation task locally or inside the builder stage so those files exist. Commit or generate them during the Docker build.

4. **CMD path mismatch in runtime image**  
   - **What failed:** Runtime COPY placed release under `/app/anoma`, but `CMD ["/app/bin/anoma", "start"]` expected `/app/bin/…`.  
   - **Fix:** Adjust either the COPY target or CMD path so both reference the same location, e.g., `COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma /app` and `CMD ["bin/anoma", "start"]`.

5. **Heavy runtime base image**  
   - **What failed:** Using `debian:stable-backports` made the image larger.  
   - **Fix:** Switch to `debian:stable-slim` or `alpine:3.19` if compatible with the Elixir release runtime dependencies (verify `libssl`, `libcrypto` presence).

6. **Healthcheck omission**  
   - **What failed:** VerifyBuild noted container has no health probe.  
   - **Fix:** Add `HEALTHCHECK CMD wget -qO- http://localhost:4000/health || exit 1` or a similar test appropriate for the app.

7. **System dependencies**  
   - **What failed:** No explicit mention, but ensure `build-essential`, `protobuf-compiler`, and `git` are present since protobuf and mix release compilation need them.  
   - **Fix:** Add `RUN apt-get install -y build-essential protobuf-compiler git` in the builder stage.

8. **Build cache and ignores**  
   - **What failed:** `.dockerignore` adjustments were correct but early versions included hidden characters or were misnamed (`\u200b.dockerignore`).  
   - **Fix:** Ensure proper file name `.dockerignore` (no zero-width characters) and include `_build`, `deps`, and editor files to trim build context.

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile for building and running the Anoma umbrella project

# Stage 1: Builder - compile Elixir releases and native dependencies
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Non-interactive to avoid tzdata prompts and keep image deterministic
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required system dependencies for building
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    cmake \
    protobuf-compiler \
    git \
    build-essential \
    curl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (required for Cairo components)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level mix configuration and umbrella manifest
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
# Copy the repository source tree that is used by Mix releases
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation
COPY params params

# Prepare Hex, Rebar and Protobuf tooling
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean deps cache before fetching (helps leverage cache on subsequent builds)
RUN mix clean --deps

# Fetch dependencies and build a release suitable for production
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release

# Stage 2: Production runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Minimal base: OpenSSL is required for libcrypto, curl for healthcheck
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    openssl \
    curl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built release from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/dev/rel/anoma .
# Copy the params directory which may be read by the runtime
COPY --from=builder /app/params params

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV HOME=/root

EXPOSE 4000

# Basic health check (adjust endpoint as needed by the app)
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -fsS http://localhost:4000/health || exit 1

# Run the release. The release bin typically starts with "start" as the first arg
ENTRYPOINT ["bin/anoma"]
CMD ["start"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile for building and running the Anoma umbrella project

# Stage 1: Builder - compile Elixir releases and native dependencies
FROM elixir:1.17 AS builder

# Non-interactive to avoid tzdata prompts and keep image deterministic
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required system dependencies for building
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    cmake \
    protobuf-compiler \
    git \
    build-essential \
    curl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust (required for Cairo components)
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Prepare build directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy top-level mix configuration and umbrella manifest
COPY global_deps.exs mix.exs mix.lock version.exs ./
# Copy the repository source tree that is used by Mix releases
COPY apps apps
COPY config config
COPY documentation documentation

# Note: Intentionally skipping the top-level 'params' directory if it does not exist in this repo

# Prepare Hex, Rebar and Protobuf tooling
RUN mix local.hex --force
RUN mix local.rebar --force
RUN mix escript.install hex protobuf --force
ENV PATH="/root/.mix/escripts:${PATH}"

# Clean deps cache before fetching (helps leverage cache on subsequent builds)
RUN mix clean --deps

# Fetch dependencies and build a release suitable for production
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix deps.get
RUN MIX_ENV=prod mix release

# Stage 2: Production runtime image
FROM debian:stable-backports AS app

# Minimal base: OpenSSL is required for libcrypto, curl for healthcheck
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    openssl \
    curl \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built release from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /app/_build/prod/rel/anoma /app/anoma

# Optional: copy params if present (not required for the build in this repo)
# COPY --from=builder /app/params /app/params

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV HOME=/root

EXPOSE 4000

# Run the release. The release bin located at /app/anoma/bin/anoma
ENTRYPOINT ["/app/anoma/bin/anoma"]
CMD ["start"]
"}
